products.name: Sweepza
products.vercel_status: custom apex/www serve app from Vercel; fresh prod deploy from origin/main (8c39db4, PR #45+#46) with live Stripe env; apex/www/health/public pages all HTTP 200
products.clerk_status: dedicated Sweepza DEVELOPMENT instance ins_3EhjrYiNBzhqkZlG9kIc2Gh4dSy (separate from E&E); auth E2E-proven (signup/signin/host-onboarding). Production instance + CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET are founder dashboard gates. On-demand app_user upsert covers signup without the webhook.
products.stripe_status: LIVE BILLING CONFIGURED AND CHECKOUT CREATION PROVEN (not yet real revenue). Account acct_1SpxXpDtcwz0cxzo (shared founder account, also E&E) KYC COMPLETE: charges_enabled+payouts_enabled+details_submitted all true. Sweepza-namespaced live products/prices: baseline $19/mo price_1TqghWDtcwz0cxzoYtZp1XYv, add-on $5/mo price_1TqghWDtcwz0cxzogpcLYkdP (metadata venture=sweepza); live webhook we_1TqghXDtcwz0cxzobypz5Rl9 -> https://sweepza.com/api/webhooks/stripe (subscription events), separate from E&E's webhook. Live keys+prices+whsec in Doppler prd + Vercel prod; fresh prod build. A cs_live_ Checkout Session was created (livemode true, $19 USD) and expired cleanly, proving app->live account->live product->live price->live checkout creation. It does NOT prove real payment->signed webhook->subscription row->entitlement->billing UI->cancellation; that final loop is the last revenue proof and needs one real-card checkout (founder). The identical loop is E2E-verified in TEST mode. scripts/verify-live-checkout.mjs is ready to confirm the loop post-payment.

Zero real user/host/listing data existed. Owner bootstrap user (clerk_user_id dev_owner, is_owner) retained; note it is a placeholder Clerk id, so real founder admin access requires mapping his real Clerk user to is_owner/is_admin.

Dedicated production Clerk instance (dashboard + clerk.sweepza.com DNS + OAuth secrets) to replace the dev instance

Map founder's real Clerk user to is_owner/is_admin for production admin access

products.name: LogLoads
products.hosting_status: PREPARED, not purchased. Single-writer architecture -> Fly.io (Dockerfile + fly.toml committed: 1 machine, /data 1GB volume, port 3002, /api/health). NOT Vercel (in-memory single-writer state does not fit serverless). Gate reduced to approve/create the Fly.io app + volume; deploy is mechanical. docs/DEPLOYMENT.md covers migration order, first-boot, backup/restore, rollback.
products.security_status: VERIFIED. RLS discrepancy reconciled+fixed. Root cause: foundation migration predated RLS, left 14 tables uncovered; phase-2 protected a different subset (both prior reports true subsets). CRITICAL exposure closed: operating_state (full-state PII blob) was anon read/write -> now service-role only, proven denied from outside with the live anon key. 36 public tables -> 35 RLS-enabled; spatial_ref_sys is the one accepted PostGIS exception. Migration 20260707050000. Advisor: zero app-table ERRORs. docs/SECURITY.md.
products.core_loop_status: VERIFIED AFTER security fix (request->approve->trip->message). validate green (lint 5/5, typecheck 9/9, 36 unit tests, build 31/31, guardrails); Playwright 22/22 mobile+desktop.
products.clerk_status: FOUNDER-GATED, code complete. Sign-in loop fixed (no-profile Clerk user -> onboarding). No Clerk Organizations/webhook/JWT-template needed for launch. Gate: create LogLoads Clerk app + keys. docs/ACTIVATION_CLERK.md.
products.stripe_status: FOUNDER-GATED, code complete. Checkout + portal + webhook (/api/billing/webhook; 3 events) wired; state mapping unit-tested. Prices STRIPE_PRICE_FLEET ($149/mo) + STRIPE_PRICE_HOST ($249/mo) with inline fallback. Can reuse shared KYC-complete account acct_1SpxXpDtcwz0cxzo. docs/ACTIVATION_STRIPE.md; tools/verify-billing.mjs.
products.resend_status: FOUNDER-GATED, code complete + fail-open honest. Gate: account + send.logloads.com domain/DNS + RESEND_API_KEY. docs/ACTIVATION_RESEND.md.
products.posthog_status: code ready, project key missing. 7-event taxonomy (UUID distinct_ids, no PII/secrets/message-content). Gate: create project, set NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY. docs/OBSERVABILITY.md.
products.sentry_status: code ready, DSN missing. Server capture via instrumentation.ts, sendDefaultPii:false. Gate: create project, set SENTRY_DSN.
products.dns_status: logloads.com unchanged; waits on a verified host. After host: fly certs add logloads.com/www + apex A/AAAA + www CNAME.
founder_gates: Approve/create the Fly.io host + 1 GB /data volume (deploy mechanical: Dockerfile + fly.toml ready)
Create the LogLoads Clerk application and provide production keys
Bind the LogLoads Stripe account (reuse acct_1SpxXpDtcwz0cxzo), create 2 prices + webhook
Authorize Resend (+ send.logloads.com DNS), PostHog, and Sentry resources and provide keys
After the host is verified, attach logloads.com (apex + www) and confirm SSL
products.state: SECURITY VERIFIED · CORE LOOP VERIFIED · SINGLE-NODE DEPLOYMENT-READY · EXTERNAL SERVICES FOUNDER-GATED

products.name: BidSpace
products.software_status: SOFTWARE COMPLETE. 43 routes, typecheck 5/5, 62 unit tests, green build, all pushed to origin.
products.internal_marketplace_loop: VERIFIED against live DB via tools/live-loop-check.ts: bid->counter->accept->award->booking->payment->settlement, $280 gross / $28 fee (10%, D018) / $252 payout; recurring copy-forward also verified.
products.live_database: VERIFIED. Supabase hnjjcgxflxlfsqslgxcv (us-west-1); migrations 0001-0011 + advisor hardening applied; demo seed loaded; public pages + viewport API serve real data.
products.connect_architecture: MODERNIZED (D028): connected accounts via controller properties (Express-equivalent), off the deprecated type:express; destination charges + application_fee + transfer_data.destination unchanged (current per Stripe docs). Webhook settlement hardened to process-first/record-on-success so a crash mid-settlement cannot strand a paid booking.
products.vercel_status: no project yet (team AutomatedEmpires team_0IgwjPKkR3NmPUC5ugTK3cfi). Repo is deploy-ready: apps/web/vercel.json added, turbo.json cache exclusion fixed, exact settings in docs/PRODUCTION-ACTIVATION.md. Deploy is intentionally gated on Clerk (ClerkProvider+middleware 500 every route without real keys) — do not ship a broken artifact.
products.clerk_status: LIVE (dev instance) + browser-verified 2026-07-10. Founder created the BidSpace Clerk app, enabled Organizations, provided pk_test/sk_test (dev instance factual-puma-97.clerk.accounts.dev, Google OAuth + email). Keys in Doppler bidspace/dev + .env.local (+ CLERK_ENCRYPTION_KEY). Rebuilt with real NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY inlined; headless-Chromium verified: app no longer 500s (was clerk.example.com), Sign-in widget mounts, homepage shows live DB opportunities, /dashboard 307-gates. Fixed 2 bugs found in verification (sign-in/up not centered; sign-in redirected to /onboarding not /dashboard). Remaining for TRUE production: a Clerk PRODUCTION instance needs a custom domain (deferred until a domain exists); the dev instance is fine for a *.vercel.app preview/soft-launch.
products.stripe_status: CODE COMPLETE + activation runbook (docs/CONNECT-RUNBOOK.md, docs/MONEY-PROOF-FIXTURE.md). claude.ai Stripe connector (new 2026-07-10) is bound to account acct_1RMjIWIH4Hw2pSG9, display name 'explore&earn' -- NOTE this is a DIFFERENT account id than acct_1SpxXpDtcwz0cxzo, the shared KYC-complete account Sweepza/LogLoads reuse. Read-only check: GetAccounts returns zero connected accounts on acct_1RMjIWIH4Hw2pSG9 (Connect not yet used on it either way). Did not bind BidSpace to either account -- which Stripe account/KYC identity to use is a founder decision, not resolved unilaterally. Internal fee/split proven; external money loop pre-designed, no new engineering after the account decision + KYC.
products.resend_status: not wired (not in scope for BidSpace launch)
products.posthog_status: INSTRUMENTED, off until key set. 7 server events (opportunity_published/duplicated, bid_submitted, bid_awarded, booking_paid, review_submitted, network_invited) + client $pageview, env-gated on NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY (own env, NOT E&E's key); distinctId = org uuid, properties = ids/cents/enums, no PII. claude.ai PostHog connector is query/analytics-only (no project-create tool) and scoped to the exploreandearn project -- cannot provision a dedicated BidSpace project from here. Founder gate: create BidSpace PostHog project at https://app.posthog.com/, set key.
products.sentry_status: DONE. Project 'bidspace' created in Sentry org automated-empires via the claude.ai Sentry connector (https://automated-empires.sentry.io/projects/bidspace/). @sentry/nextjs wired (instrumentation.ts server/edge, instrumentation-client.ts browser, withSentryConfig, sendDefaultPii:false); error.tsx/global-error.tsx report via Sentry.captureException. Event delivery PROVEN: tools/verify-sentry.ts fired a real event, confirmed landing as issue BIDSPACE-1 via the Sentry API, then resolved as a deliberate test. DSN in Doppler bidspace/dev + .env.local; copy to bidspace/prd when promoting. No founder action needed for Sentry. Verified both DSN-present and DSN-absent build cleanly.
products.mapbox_status: LIVE + browser-verified 2026-07-10. Founder-provided public token (user automatedempires) validated against the Mapbox Styles+Tokens API (TokenValid), stored in Doppler bidspace/dev + .env.local. /map renders real Mapbox tiles over Spokane with all 5 seeded positions + price markers (verified in headless Chromium). Token is currently unrestricted (default) -- swap for a URL-restricted token scoped to the prod host before public launch (non-blocking).
products.dns_status: public domain not selected (out of scope); use a temporary *.vercel.app host
products.deploy_status: UNBLOCKED (Clerk dev instance works on any origin incl *.vercel.app). Repo is deploy-ready (apps/web/vercel.json, turbo cache fix). The Vercel MCP is deploy-only (no env-var API), so a WORKING deploy still needs a founder dashboard step: import AutomatedEmpires/bidspace into a Vercel project (root apps/web) and wire env (connect Doppler bidspace OR paste the vars). All env values exist in Doppler bidspace/dev today.
founder_gates: Decide which Stripe account BidSpace uses (new acct_1RMjIWIH4Hw2pSG9 'explore&earn' vs shared KYC-complete acct_1SpxXpDtcwz0cxzo vs a fresh account) + complete KYC/beneficial-owner/bank on the chosen one
